channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: aespa @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-07 03:00 — aespa at Oakland Arena. aespa is a rising K-pop sensation with a strong live reputation, making their Oakland show a must-see.

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-28 02:30 → 2026-10-29 02:30 — Phoebe Bridgers at Chase Center. Phoebe Bridgers has a compelling narrative and a dedicated fanbase, ensuring an impactful performance at Chase Center.

item.title: Cavetown @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-10-07 03:00 — Cavetown at Fox Theater - Oakland. Cavetown's unique blend of indie pop and heartfelt lyrics has garnered significant buzz, making this show a highlight.

item.title: My Morning Jacket @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-07 03:00 — My Morning Jacket at The Fillmore. My Morning Jacket is known for their electrifying live shows, and their performance at The Fillmore is highly anticipated.

item.title: Gracie Abrams @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-07 04:00 — Gracie Abrams at Oakland Arena. Gracie Abrams is a rising star in pop music, and her tour promises an intimate and memorable experience.

item.title: The Menzingers @ Great American Music Hall
item.description: 2026-10-07 02:00 — The Menzingers at Great American Music Hall. The Menzingers are a fan-favorite punk band with a strong live presence, making their show at Great American Music Hall a must-see.

item.title: John Summit @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-05 03:00 — John Summit at Oakland Arena. John Summit is a prominent name in the electronic scene, and his tour is expected to deliver an energetic performance.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. KATSEYE is an emerging artist with a unique sound, making their tour an exciting event to catch.

item.title: Sombr @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — Sombr at SAP Center at San Jose. Gorillaz are known for their innovative live shows, and their upcoming tour promises a unique experience.

item.title: Hugel @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-11-08 02:00 — Hugel at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Olivia Rodrigo continues to captivate audiences with her music, and her tour is expected to be a highlight of the year.

item.title: Nothing But Thieves @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2027-04-04 03:00 — Nothing But Thieves at Fox Theater - Oakland. Nothing But Thieves is known for their powerful live performances, making their tour a must-see.

item.title: SWITCHFOOT @ Blue Note Napa Summer Sessions
item.description: 2026-10-24 02:00 — SWITCHFOOT at Blue Note Napa Summer Sessions. Switchfoot's engaging live shows and dedicated fanbase make their concert a noteworthy event.

item.title: Bryson Tiller @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-10-28 02:30 — Bryson Tiller at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Bryson Tiller's unique sound and strong following ensure his tour will be an exciting experience.

item.title: Fetty Wap @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-12-04 04:00 — Fetty Wap at The Masonic. Fetty Wap's nostalgic appeal and energetic performances make his show at The Masonic an exciting event.

item.title: Chayanne @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-12 02:00 — Chayanne at Chase Center. Chayanne's tour promises a vibrant performance, appealing to fans of Latin pop music.

item.title: Caifanes @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-10-30 03:00 — Caifanes at San Jose Civic. Caifanes is a legendary band in the Latin rock scene, and their show is expected to attract a large crowd.

item.title: SiM @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-10-16 03:00 — SiM at August Hall. SiM is gaining popularity in the rock scene, and their tour promises an engaging live experience.
